cards.definition: The two main windows in the year when White Stem Borer beetles reach adulthood and become active — the key periods for monitoring and control.
cards.analogy: Two distinct hatching seasons, not a single window — missing either one means missing half the pest's active population.
cards.why_it_matters: Control measures timed outside these two windows are largely wasted effort.
cards.cloze: Coffee White Stem Borer beetles attain adulthood mainly during ___.

cards.definition: The proportion of the October-December WSB generation that goes on to reach adulthood by the following April-May emergence window, versus staying dormant longer.
cards.analogy: A minority of one generation moving fast, the majority holding back — a split brood strategy, not a single wave.
cards.why_it_matters: Explains why WSB populations don't simply double each cycle — most of one generation is still in reserve for later.
cards.cloze: Of the WSB beetles emerging October-December, only ___% attain adulthood by the following April-May.

cards.definition: The height at which an infested plant can be collar-pruned to remove borer damage that hasn't yet reached the root, salvaging the plant rather than removing it entirely.
cards.analogy: Cutting back to healthy wood below the damage, the way a gardener prunes a diseased branch back past the infection line.
cards.why_it_matters: A salvage option short of uprooting — worth knowing before assuming an infested plant is a total loss.
cards.cloze: Borer-infested plants that haven't been reached at the root can be collar pruned at a height of ___ inches from ground level.

cards.definition: The recommended density of pheromone traps per hectare in areas with heavy White Stem Borer pressure.
cards.analogy: A monitoring-and-mass-trapping density, not a token trap or two per field.
cards.why_it_matters: A concrete number to check a farm's pest-management effort against, rather than just asking 'do you use traps.'
cards.cloze: In highly WSB-infested areas, ___ pheromone traps per hectare should be installed.
